Cranberry Pie

Ingredients

  • 2 cups fresh cranberries (or more)
  • 1 tbsp sugar
  • 1 tsp cinnamon
  • ¾ cup melted butter
  • ½ cup chopped walnuts
  • Pinch of salt
  • 1 cup sugar
  • 1 cup flour
  • 1 tsp almond extract
  • 1 egg, beaten

Directions

  1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
  2. Fill a 10" pie pan with fresh cranberries.
  3. Sprinkle cranberries with 1 tbsp sugar and 1 tsp cinnamon (or more to taste).
  4. Combine the remaining ingredients, mix well, and pour over the cranberries.
  5. Bake for 45 minutes.
